# Project Reference - project-reference

> **IMPORTANT:** These are summaries. READ the full doc file when working in the matching context.

## [Project Structure Reference](../../docs/project-reference/project-structure-reference.md)

**Summary:** Authoritative map of services, ports, directory layout, tech-stack versions, and module codes (all `file:line`-cited) — reusable framework set (`src/Platform/`) + layered example app (Api/Application/Domain/Infrastructure/Persistence) + Nx Angular frontend, orchestrated by Docker Compose. Covers service architecture, infra ports, CI/CD, and quick-start commands.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/project-structure-reference.md` when: Placing code in the correct project, looking up service ports/paths/module codes, tech-stack versions, or local startup commands.

## [Code Review Rules](../../docs/project-reference/code-review-rules.md)

**Summary:** Repo-specific DO/DON'T review rules with real `file:line` anti-patterns — validation via `PlatformValidationResult` (never throw), side effects in entity event handlers, logic in lowest layer, DTO-owned mapping, RabbitMQ for cross-service, `AppBase*` frontend base classes. Includes backend/frontend/architecture rule sets, anti-patterns, decision trees, and checklists.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/code-review-rules.md` when: Reviewing a PR or self-checking changes before commit; verifying repo-specific conventions instead of generic style advice.

## [Feature Docs Reference](../../docs/project-reference/feature-docs-reference.md)

**Summary:** Conventions for business feature docs — 26-section template, `file:line` evidence for every test case, app-to-service mapping (`playground-text-snippet` → TextSnippet layers + `text-snippet-domain`), backend layer paths, feature-doc structure, templates, and coverage gaps. Docs live under `docs/business-features/{Module}/detailed-features/`.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/feature-docs-reference.md` when: Creating or updating business feature documentation, or locating the backend/frontend layers and doc directory for a feature.

## [Documentation Index Reference](../../docs/project-reference/docs-index-reference.md)

**Summary:** Navigation map for the Easy.Platform docs (glob-verified counts) — documentation system overview, doc graph, key doc relationships, and a Doc Lookup Guide mapping tasks to the right doc. `docs/project-reference/` holds canonical AI-context docs; `docs/templates/` holds authoring templates.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/docs-index-reference.md` when: Finding which doc to open for a given task, or understanding the overall documentation structure and relationships.

## [Lessons](../../docs/project-reference/lessons.md)

**Summary:** Project-specific lessons-learned context referenced by skills and agents. Currently a template placeholder — populate with recurring failure modes and conventions as they are discovered.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/lessons.md` when: Checking for prior project-specific lessons before starting non-trivial work, or recording a new lesson learned.
